a.xlink:title: Full PARLIO encode bench for ESP32-P4 (post-byte-LUT, #2526 landed).
Inline implementation details for wave8 transposition.
Centralized LED chipset timing definitions with nanosecond precision.
Centralized logging categories for FastLED hardware interfaces and subsystems.
Shared u32 "spread LUT" bit-matrix transpose primitive (no SIMD, no u64).
Alignment macros and utilities for FastLED.
Encoding pipeline selector for clockless LED chipsets.
FastLED chrono implementation - duration types for time measurements.
FastLED ratio implementation - compile-time rational arithmetic.
